subject: Vegito, the Potara fusion of Son Goku and Vegeta, in a close-up intense expression with spiky hair in battle-ready stance
description: A male-presenting figure with a prominent spiky dark hairline fills the frame in a close-up portrait. The face is rendered with sharp angular features and a fierce, determined expression — brows furrowed, eyes intense. The figure wears a gi-style outfit with a dark vest or jacket over a lighter under-layer. The card border and text blocks reference the fusion characters Son Goku and Vegeta explicitly. The background is a dynamic red and orange gradient with streaks suggesting high speed or energy discharge.
foreground: male-presenting fighter with spiky dark hair and intense expression in battle attire
background: red and orange energy gradient with speed streaks
